news.t: Hartford Funds' First Semi-Transparent ETF Will Target Large Cap Growth

holdings.infoBox: HFGO is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.83%, Alphabet at 8.73%, Apple at 8.17%, Broadcom at 6.95%, and Amazon.com at 5.21%.

overview.description: The Hartford Large Cap Growth ETF (HFGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an active, non-transparent fund that invests in large-cap stocks that are perceived to exhibit long-term growth potential. The fund utilizes the Fidelity non-transparent model. HFGO was launched on Nov 9, 2021 and is issued by The Hartford.

data.title: Hartford Funds' First Semi-Transparent ETF Will Target Large Cap Growth
data.text: WAYNE, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hartford Funds announced today the listing of its first actively managed, semi-transparent exchange-traded fund (“ETF”), which will be sub-advised by Wellington Management...
